scripts.lint: turbo run lint && bun run docs:check
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check packages/*/src packages/*/package.json packages/*/tsconfig.json adapters/*/src adapters/*/package.json adapters/*/tsconfig.json apps scripts package.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json .lefthook.yml README.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md
scripts.format:fix: oxfmt packages/*/src packages/*/package.json packages/*/tsconfig.json adapters/*/src adapters/*/package.json adapters/*/tsconfig.json apps scripts package.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json .lefthook.yml README.md CLAUDE.md AGENTS.md
scripts.check: turbo run lint typecheck test && bun run docs:check
